title: Comparison of the Corrosion Resistance of Alkaline- and Acid-Anodized Titanium
author_string: Karambakhsh, Ali, Ghahramani, Shahram, Afshar, Abdollah, Malekinejad, Pejman
publisher: Association for Materials Protection and Performance (AMPP)
abstract: The process of self-color anodizing of titanium is done in acidic and alkaline solutions, and anodic films of different colors are formed. Results of this work show that the corrosion rate of titanium decreased after the application of an anodizing layer.
